name: Senolytics dasatinib and quercetin in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis: results of a phase I, single-blind, single-center, randomized, placebo-controlled pilot trial on feasibility and tolerability
summary: 2023 EBioMedicine phase 1 single-blind randomized placebo-controlled pilot in 12 idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis participants, reporting complete dosing and assessments, no D+Q-related serious adverse events, more non-serious adverse events in the D+Q arm, and no meaningful between-group differences in exploratory frailty, pulmonary, or physical-function measures.
